<script>
(() => {
  const parseNumber = (value) => {
    const num = Number.parseFloat(String(value == null ? '' : value).replace(/,/g, '').trim());
    return Number.isFinite(num) ? num : null;
  };

  const normalize = (value) => String(value == null ? '' : value).trim();
  const slot = (name) => document.querySelector('[data-quote-slot="' + name + '"]');

  const setText = (name, text) => {
    const el = slot(name);
    if (el) {
      el.textContent = text;
    }
    return el;
  };

  const setLink = (name, label, href) => {
    const el = slot(name);
    if (!el) {
      return;
    }
    el.setAttribute('href', href);
    const target = el.querySelector('p') || el.firstElementChild || el;
    target.textContent = label;
  };

  const setTitle = (label, value) => {
    const el = slot('title');
    if (!el) {
      return;
    }

    while (el.firstChild) {
      el.removeChild(el.firstChild);
    }

    if (!value) {
      el.textContent = label;
      return;
    }

    const labelEl = document.createElement('span');
    labelEl.textContent = label;
    labelEl.style.display = 'block';

    const valueEl = document.createElement('span');
    valueEl.textContent = value;
    valueEl.style.display = 'block';
    valueEl.style.marginTop = '8px';

    el.appendChild(labelEl);
    el.appendChild(valueEl);
  };

  const formatMoney = (value, currency) => {
    try {
      return new Intl.NumberFormat('en-US', { style: 'currency', currency: currency || 'USD' }).format(value);
    } catch (error) {
      return new Intl.NumberFormat('en-US', { style: 'currency', currency: 'USD' }).format(value);
    }
  };

  const getQuote = () => {
    const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search || '');
    const opp = normalize(params.get('opp'));
    const token = normalize(params.get('token'));
    const low = parseNumber(params.get('low'));
    const high = parseNumber(params.get('high'));
    const currency = normalize(params.get('currency')) || 'USD';

    if (!(low > 0) || !(high > 0)) {
      return null;
    }

    return { opp, token, low, high, currency };
  };

  const buildQuery = (pairs) => {
    const params = new URLSearchParams();
    pairs.forEach((pair) => {
      if (pair[1]) {
        params.set(pair[0], pair[1]);
      }
    });
    const query = params.toString();
    return query ? '?' + query : '';
  };

  const validateOpportunity = async (opp, token) => {
    if (!opp || !token) {
      return { valid: 0, message: 'Missing secure estimate reference.' };
    }

    try {
      const response = await window.fetch('/api/method/validate_public_funnel_opportunity?opportunity=' + encodeURIComponent(opp) + '&token=' + encodeURIComponent(token), {
        method: 'GET',
        headers: {
          Accept: 'application/json',
          'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest'
        },
        credentials: 'same-origin'
      });
      const payload = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));
      const message = payload && payload.message ? payload.message : {};
      if (!response.ok) {
        return { valid: 0, message: 'We could not validate that estimate link.' };
      }
      return {
        valid: Number(message.valid || 0) === 1 ? 1 : 0,
        opportunity: normalize(message.opportunity),
        message: normalize(message.message) || 'We could not find that estimate. Please return to the estimate page and try again.'
      };
    } catch (error) {
      return { valid: 0, message: 'We could not validate that estimate link.' };
    }
  };

  const applyFallback = () => {
    setText('eyebrow', 'Estimate pending');
    setTitle('We are preparing your estimate');
    setText('note', 'Your request is in. Our team will review the scope and follow up shortly if anything needs clarification.');
    setText('step-1-title', 'Request captured');
    setText('step-1-copy', 'Your building details, cleaning frequency, and service preferences are attached to this request.');
    setText('step-2-title', 'Estimate review');
    setText('step-2-copy', 'We review the scope, confirm the pricing inputs, and flag anything that needs a closer look.');
    setText('step-3-title', 'Need to add context?');
    setText('step-3-copy', 'If there are access notes, specialty floors, or other site details we should consider, contact us and we will add them to the request.');
    setLink('cta-primary', 'Talk to Our Team', '/contact');
    setLink('cta-secondary', 'Review Services', '/services');
  };

  const applyGenericEstimate = (displayLabel) => {
    setText('eyebrow', 'Instant estimate');
    setTitle('Your estimated monthly range', displayLabel);
    setText('note', 'Your estimate range is still available here, but we could not reopen the walkthrough from this link. Our team can help continue the request.');
    setText('step-1-title', 'Estimate ready');
    setText('step-1-copy', 'Your estimate range is still available for review on this page.');
    setText('step-2-title', 'Need the walkthrough reopened?');
    setText('step-2-copy', 'If you need help continuing to the walkthrough step, contact our team and we will reopen the correct path.');
    setText('step-3-title', 'Keep moving');
    setText('step-3-copy', 'You can still review services or contact us while we help reconnect the request.');
    setLink('cta-primary', 'Talk to Our Team', '/contact');
    setLink('cta-secondary', 'Review Services', '/services');
  };

  const applyWalkthrough = (quote, displayLabel) => {
    setText('eyebrow', 'Instant estimate');
    setTitle('Your estimated monthly range', displayLabel);
    setText('note', 'This range is based on your current scope. Next step is a digital walkthrough so we can confirm the site details and move the request forward.');
    setText('step-1-title', 'How this range was built');
    setText('step-1-copy', 'We used your building type, square footage, service frequency, selected service mix, and bathroom traffic level to generate this monthly estimate.');
    setText('step-2-title', 'Why we need a walkthrough');
    setText('step-2-copy', 'A digital walkthrough helps us confirm layout, access, special areas, and any site-specific details that can change scope.');
    setText('step-3-title', 'What happens after upload');
    setText('step-3-copy', 'Once we receive the walkthrough, our team reviews it against this estimate and follows up with the next step.');
    setLink('cta-primary', 'Submit Digital Walkthrough', '/digital-walkthrough' + buildQuery([['opp', quote.opp], ['token', quote.token]]));
    setLink('cta-secondary', 'Talk to Our Team', '/contact');
  };

  const applyQuote = async () => {
    const quote = getQuote();
    if (!quote) {
      applyFallback();
      return;
    }

    const displayLabel = formatMoney(quote.low, quote.currency) + ' - ' + formatMoney(quote.high, quote.currency);
    const validation = await validateOpportunity(quote.opp, quote.token);

    if (!validation.valid) {
      applyGenericEstimate(displayLabel);
      return;
    }

    applyWalkthrough(quote, displayLabel);
  };

  const requiredSlots = [
    'eyebrow',
    'title',
    'note',
    'step-1-title',
    'step-1-copy',
    'step-2-title',
    'step-2-copy',
    'step-3-title',
    'step-3-copy',
    'cta-primary',
    'cta-secondary'
  ];

  const boot = () => {
    let attempts = 0;
    const tick = () => {
      attempts += 1;
      const ready = requiredSlots.every((name) => !!slot(name));
      if (!ready) {
        if (attempts < 30) {
          window.setTimeout(tick, 150);
        }
        return;
      }
      applyQuote();
    };
    tick();
  };

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', boot, { once: true });
  } else {
    boot();
  }

  window.addEventListener('load', boot, { once: true });
})();
</script>

<style>
  .dw-success-shell {
    width: 100%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f7f9fc 0%, #ffffff 100%);
  }
  .dw-success-wrap {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 48px 20px 72px;
    box-sizing: border-box;
  }
  .dw-success-card {
    width: 100%;
    background: #103d29;
    border-radius: 28px;
    padding: 44px 32px;
    color: #ffffff;
    box-sizing: border-box;
  }
  .dw-success-eyebrow {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #9fe6bf;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .dw-success-title {
    margin: 18px auto 0;
    max-width: 760px;
    font-size: clamp(34px, 4vw, 56px);
    line-height: 1.08;
    text-align: center;
    letter-spacing: -0.03em;
  }
  .dw-success-copy {
    margin: 18px auto 0;
    max-width: 760px;
    font-size: 18px;
    line-height: 1.55;
    text-align: center;
    color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.84);
  }
  .dw-success-grid {
    margin-top: 34px;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
    gap: 18px;
  }
  .dw-success-step {
    background: #ffffff;
    border-radius: 22px;
    padding: 24px 22px;
    color: #171717;
  }
  .dw-success-step-number {
    width: 40px;
    height: 40px;
    border-radius: 999px;
    background: #f3f3f3;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-weight: 700;
  }
  .dw-success-step h3 {
    margin: 16px 0 0;
    font-size: 20px;
    line-height: 1.25;
  }
  .dw-success-step p {
    margin: 12px 0 0;
    font-size: 16px;
    line-height: 1.55;
    color: #4f4f4f;
  }
  .dw-success-actions {
    margin-top: 30px;
    display: flex;
    gap: 12px;
    justify-content: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }
  .dw-success-actions a {
    text-decoration: none;
    border-radius: 14px;
    padding: 14px 20px;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 15px;
    line-height: 1.1;
  }
  .dw-success-primary {
    background: #ffffff;
    color: #103d29;
  }
  .dw-success-secondary {
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
    color: #ffffff;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18);
  }
  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    .dw-success-wrap {
      padding: 36px 16px 52px;
    }
    .dw-success-card {
      padding: 32px 20px;
      border-radius: 24px;
    }
    .dw-success-grid {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }
    .dw-success-copy {
      font-size: 16px;
    }
  }
</style>
<script>
(() => {
  const slot = (name) => document.querySelector('[data-quote-slot="' + name + '"]');

  const validateOpportunity = async (opp, token) => {
    if (!opp || !token) {
      return { valid: 0 };
    }
    try {
      const response = await window.fetch('/api/method/validate_public_funnel_opportunity?opportunity=' + encodeURIComponent(opp) + '&token=' + encodeURIComponent(token), {
        method: 'GET',
        headers: {
          Accept: 'application/json',
          'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest'
        },
        credentials: 'same-origin'
      });
      const payload = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));
      const message = payload && payload.message ? payload.message : {};
      if (!response.ok) {
        return { valid: 0 };
      }
      return {
        valid: Number(message.valid || 0) === 1 ? 1 : 0,
        opportunity: String(message.opportunity || '').trim()
      };
    } catch (error) {
      return { valid: 0 };
    }
  };

  const personalize = (opp) => {
    const eyebrow = slot('eyebrow');
    const title = slot('title');
    const copy = slot('note');
    const step1 = slot('step-1-copy');
    const step2 = slot('step-2-copy');
    const step3 = slot('step-3-copy');
    if (eyebrow) {
      eyebrow.textContent = 'Walkthrough attached';
    }
    if (title) {
      title.textContent = 'We attached your walkthrough to your estimate';
    }
    if (copy) {
      copy.textContent = 'Your upload is linked to estimate ' + opp + '. Our team will review it and follow up with the refined next step.';
    }
    if (step1) {
      step1.textContent = 'Your file is linked directly to estimate ' + opp + ' for internal review.';
    }
    if (step2) {
      step2.textContent = 'We compare the walkthrough to your estimate request and tighten the next step from there.';
    }
    if (step3) {
      step3.textContent = 'If we need anything else, we will use the contact details already on that estimate request to follow up.';
    }
  };

  const boot = async () => {
    const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search || '');
    const opp = String(params.get('opp') || '').trim();
    const token = String(params.get('token') || '').trim();
    if (!opp || !token) {
      return;
    }
    const validation = await validateOpportunity(opp, token);
    if (!validation.valid) {
      return;
    }
    personalize(validation.opportunity || opp);
  };

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', boot, { once: true });
  } else {
    boot();
  }
})();
</script>
